name: covid_cough_detection
description: COVID-19 Cough Detection System - Enterprise Edition

scripts.dev: concurrently "corepack pnpm --filter ./client run dev" "corepack pnpm --filter ./server run dev"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter ./client run build && corepack pnpm --filter ./server run build
scripts.check: corepack pnpm --filter ./client run check && corepack pnpm --filter ./server run check
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter ./client run lint && corepack pnpm --filter ./server run lint
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter ./client run test && corepack pnpm --filter ./server run test
scripts.clean: corepack pnpm --filter ./client run clean && corepack pnpm --filter ./server run clean
